positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for pos_tom_olive_garden
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u43,axiom,
    managed_building(sK0)).

cnf(u42,axiom,
    allows_pets(sK0)).

cnf(u60,negated_conjecture,
    ~allows_pets(olive_garden)).

cnf(u53,axiom,
    ~deposit_amount(X0,X2) | ~deposit_amount(X0,X1) | X1 = X2).

cnf(u62,axiom,
    deposit_equals(sK1(X0),X1) | ~managed_building(X0) | ~monthly_rent(X0,X1) | more_than(sK1(X0),X1)).

cnf(u57,axiom,
    ~deposit_amount(X0,X1) | sK1(X0) = X1 | ~managed_building(X0)).

cnf(u44,axiom,
    ~deposit_amount(X0,X2) | more_than(X2,X1) | ~managed_building(X0) | ~monthly_rent(X0,X1) | deposit_equals(X2,X1)).

cnf(u52,axiom,
    deposit_amount(X0,sK1(X0)) | ~managed_building(X0)).

cnf(u45,axiom,
    cat(fluffy)).

cnf(u55,axiom,
    pet(fluffy)).

cnf(u56,axiom,
    ~deposit_equals(amount_2000,amount_1500)).

cnf(u54,negated_conjecture,
    ~allowed_to_move_in(tom,olive_garden,fluffy)).

cnf(u47,axiom,
    managed_building(olive_garden)).

cnf(u49,axiom,
    more_than(amount_2000,amount_1500)).

cnf(u46,axiom,
    ~cat(X0) | pet(X0)).

cnf(u48,axiom,
    monthly_rent(olive_garden,amount_2000)).

cnf(u51,axiom,
    ~more_than(X0,X1) | ~deposit_equals(X0,X1)).

cnf(u50,axiom,
    allowed_to_move_in(X1,X0,X2) | ~managed_building(X0) | ~allows_pets(X0) | ~pet(X2)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define deposit_required(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define deposit_within_limit(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define owner(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define will_rent(X0,X1) := $true
for all inputs,
    define less_than(X0,X1) := $false
for all groundings,
    whenever ? [X2] : (deposit_amount(X0,X2) & (deposit_equals(X2,X1) | less_than(X2,X1))) is false, set ~deposit_within_limit(X0,X1) to true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
